name: 100,000 Calorie Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the cake mix, butter and 1/3 cup of evaporated milk in a bowl until well combined.
2. Spread half of this mixture into a greased 13x9-inch pan.
3. Bake at 350°F for 6 minutes.
4. Sprinkle chocolate chips and chopped nuts evenly over the baked mixture.
5. Melt caramel candies in milk until smooth.
6. Drizzle melted caramel sauce over the chocolate chips and nuts.
7. Spread remaining batter over the top of the layered ingredients.
8. Bake at 350°F for an additional 20 minutes, or until set.
